tasks.subject: Task 1: PortSpec record + PortDefinition POCO

tasks.subject: Task 2: NodePortRegistry with full unit-test coverage
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Static thread-safe registry. Exact-type lookup; atomic conflict policy; immutable snapshots; full TDD coverage.

**Files:** Create src/NodiumGraph/NodePortRegistry.cs, tests/NodiumGraph.Tests/NodePortRegistryTests.cs

**Verify:** dotnet test --filter FullyQualifiedName~NodePortRegistryTests

tasks.subject: Task 4: NodiumGraphCanvas reorder + AttachProvider idempotency
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Prevent canvas double-attach from lazy getter. Reorder AddNodeContainer; idempotency guard on AttachProvider; regression test.

**Files:** Modify src/NodiumGraph/Controls/NodiumGraphCanvas.cs, Create tests/NodiumGraph.Tests/CanvasMaterializationTests.cs

**Verify:** dotnet test --filter FullyQualifiedName~CanvasMaterializationTests + full suite green


tasks.subject: Task 5: NodeTemplate IDataTemplate + AXAML integration tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add <ng:NodeTemplate> with EndInit-time registration; exact-type Match; full Avalonia headless integration tests.

**Files:** Create src/NodiumGraph/Controls/NodeTemplate.cs; Modify src/NodiumGraph/NodePortRegistry.cs (add overload); Create test window + axaml + tests file.

**Verify:** dotnet test --filter FullyQualifiedName~DeclarativeNodeTemplateTests + full suite green

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/NodiumGraph/Controls/NodeTemplate.cs","src/NodiumGraph/NodePortRegistry.cs","tests/NodiumGraph.Tests/Helpers/DeclarativePortsTestWindow.axaml","tests/NodiumGraph.Tests/Helpers/DeclarativePortsTestWindow.axaml.cs","tests/NodiumGraph.Tests/DeclarativeNodeTemplateTests.cs"],"verifyCommand":"dotnet test tests/NodiumGraph.Tests/NodiumGraph.Tests.csproj --filter FullyQualifiedName~DeclarativeNodeTemplateTests","planPath":"docs/plans/2026-05-14-declarative-axaml-ports.md"}
```
